guidance: Teach a repeatable framework or mental model a service-business owner can apply this week. Name the steps concretely. Premium and confident, never generic.
evidence_note: Grounded in Black Arrow's method and general operating logic; no invented stats.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Authority / Frameworks' was the most under-served eligible category (target 25%, recent 18%).
post_rationale: Carousels lead saves/depth for authority content per 2026 benchmarks, and this turns Black Arrow's four-system method into a named, testable framework distinct from the self-scoring mental model and forensic diagnostic already shipped.

guidance: Interpret a genuinely recent, relevant marketing/software development for service-business owners: what it means and what they should do. Be the interpreter, not a reposter.
evidence_note: Only if current and verifiable from your research. Cite the source. Distinguish fact from interpretation.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'News / Industry Intelligence' was the most under-served eligible category (target 15%, recent 8%).
post_rationale: Reels still lead reach for cold audiences, and this interprets a genuinely new, uncovered CRM/AI platform shift through the account's core speed-to-lead lens with a concrete pre-launch checklist instead of a generic feature recap.

guidance: Teach ONE specific, actionable tactic they can do this week to make more money. Real steps, scripts, or settings — worth paying for.
evidence_note: Tactics must be logically airtight and actually executable as described.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Education / Informative' was the most under-served eligible category (target 20%, recent 15%).
post_rationale: Reels still lead reach for cold audiences in 2026, and this tests an unclaimed channel (the website contact form, not calls or texts) with a friend-run, logically sound audit and a concrete fix an owner can ship this week.
